question: Adversarially review this proposed I operator before it is added to deep_reflect.md. Look for conceptual overlap with desire/tactic/principle, prompt wording that will cause smuggling or confusion, hidden circularity in the gates, runtime assumptions that are too weak or too strong, risks in the working-body seed, strength/dormancy problems, and whether the first live slice is behaviorally testable. If something should change before implementation, say exactly what and why.
notes: This is a pre-implementation prompt/runtime review, not a request for a general summary.
Prefer high-signal objections and concrete keep/change recommendations.
Focus on the proposed live operator shape, not abstract future philosophy.
